metadata.title: Bizarre Lineage Strategy: Level 1 to Prestige Step-by-Step
metadata.description: The definitive chronological guide for Bizarre Lineage. Follow these steps to maximize EXP, farm money, and reach your first Prestige efficiently.

hero.title: Bizarre Lineage: Complete Beginner Strategy
hero.description: Don't waste time. Follow this linear path to master the early game, from your first EXP buff to your first Prestige reset.

aside.title: Strategy Brief
aside.description: The goal is Level 50 and $10,000. Stack EXP buffs constantly and prioritize PvE Gang Contracts over everything else.

checklist.title: Complete Tutorial (1.5x EXP)
checklist.description: Talk to the receptionist first. This permanent early-game boost is the foundation of your speed-leveling strategy.

checklist.title: Unlock Rhett (Bus Stops)
checklist.description: Unlock teleportation immediately. Moving between Bus Stop 1 (Contracts) and Bus Stop 2 (Gym) is key to your loop.

checklist.title: Gym Treadmill (Extra 1.5x EXP)
checklist.description: Go to the Gym (Bus Stop 2). Using the treadmill grants another 15 minutes of boost. Refresh this every 30 minutes.

checklist.title: Visit Pawn Shop for Cash
checklist.description: Located in Rahage. Sell all unwanted loot here. You need $10,000 for prestige; start saving from level 1.

first_thirty_minutes.title: Storyline (Levels 1 - 64)
first_thirty_minutes.description: Follow the main questline as long as you can. It provides steady, high-volume EXP for solo progression.

first_thirty_minutes.title: Gang Contracts (Efficiency)
first_thirty_minutes.description: Switch to the Gang Contractor (Bus Stop 1). Focus on 'Capture Territory' for passive gains and 'Rob Civilian' for active EXP.

first_thirty_minutes.title: Reset PvP Assignments
first_thirty_minutes.description: If the contractor gives you a 'Defeat Player' quest, talk to him again to reset. PvP is too slow for efficient leveling.

first_thirty_minutes.title: Passive Territory Income
first_thirty_minutes.description: Control all three zones. This generates EXP and money automatically every 1-2 minutes while you do other tasks.

power_systems.title: Stand Arrows & Skins
power_systems.description: Use regular arrows for your build. Save Lucky Arrows from legendary chests for guaranteed skins only.

power_systems.title: Skateboard Upgrades
power_systems.description: Get the basic plank from NPC Gupta. Trade gold coins at Bus Stop 2 for the real skateboard to maximize speed.

power_systems.title: Weapons & Skills
power_systems.description: Farm bosses and raids for weapons. They add right-click abilities that complement your stand's power.

power_systems.title: Subclasses & Fighting Styles
power_systems.description: Once stable, look into Subclasses (Vampire, Hamon) and Styles (Boxing). Check our dedicated pages for details.

mistakes_cards.title: Subclasses Guide
mistakes_cards.description: View detailed info on Vampire, Hamon, and Cyborg abilities.

mistakes_cards.title: Fighting Styles Guide
mistakes_cards.description: Learn about Boxing, Kendo, and Karate requirements.

mistakes_cards.title: Stands Database
mistakes_cards.description: Check SSS-Rank stand stats and personality buffs.

mistakes_cards.title: Tier List
mistakes_cards.description: Compare the best stands for PvE and PvP combat.

goals.title: Reach Level 50
goals.description: The mandatory level for your first Prestige. Keep stacking Gym buffs to hit this milestone as fast as possible.

goals.title: Bank $10,000 Cash
goals.description: The prestige fee. If you're short, grind 'Rob Civilian' contracts or sell accessories at the Pawn Shop.

goals.title: Prestige at Bus Stop 10
goals.description: Talk to Arch Mitch. Reset to Level 1 to unlock permanent storage and earn Prestige Shards for perks.

faq.question: What is the best leveling loop?
faq.answer: Gym Buff -> Capture 3 Territories -> Rob Civilians -> Repeat. This maximizes both passive and active EXP.

faq.question: How do I get Lucky Arrows?
faq.answer: Legendary chests are your primary source. They are rare, so use them wisely for skins you actually want.

faq.question: When should I start raids?
faq.answer: Raids are better for mid-to-late game gear. Focus on solo leveling and money farming until you hit Level 50.
